query:
SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, publishedModel, awayModelSpread, homeModelSpread, modelTotal,
       modelAwaySpreadOdds, modelHomeSpreadOdds, modelOverOdds, modelUnderOdds
FROM games
WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-19' AND sport = 'NCAAM'
LIMIT 3;
